implementation: station_line, unit, or admdong fixed effects
reason: Blocks permanent differences such as anchor strength, land use, and baseline transit centrality.
Absorbs seasonality, macro shocks, and common COVID-period changes.
Useful as sensitivity check, but can absorb part of the treatment path if used as the only preferred specification.

implementation: pre-opening baseline log outcome interacted with post
reason: Checks whether results are driven by large anchor stations or dongs responding differently after 2022.
Allows treated units to have a different pandemic-period level before opening.
Controlling for it would block part of route-reallocation effects.

variable_or_design: Post-opening living population or visitor composition
reason: This is likely on the path from transport change to commerce composition.

variable_or_design: Post-opening store count or service mix
reason: Store mix can respond to the opening and to unobserved demand shocks.

variable_or_design: Weather, event, and local construction shocks
reason: Could improve precision if measured, but is not available in the current project files.
